style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Jynx's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in her polished armor; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along her seam lines, casting sharp geometric shadows. A cool cyan aura radiates in precise hexagonal patterns around her body, illuminated by a pale blue-white light that highlights every metallic dust particle in motion. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
